{{Quote|…while the fanatical Grand Admiral Il-Raz committed suicide by plunging his flagship into the heart of the Denarii Nova.|''The Essential Chronology''|<ref name="EC" />}}
The '''''Emperor's Disciple''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] that served as the personal [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Ishin-Il-Raz]]. Seeking the approval of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] following his appointment to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] in [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]], Il-Raz commanded several<ref name="Who" /> successful<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|118|Ishin-Il-Raz}}</ref> missions from the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] of the ''Emperor's Disciple'', including the [[Massacre of Myomar]] and the [[bombardment of Shalam]].<ref name="Who" />

When Palpatine was [[Death/Legends|killed]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Who" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> Il-Raz spiralled into a suicidal depression. Eight [[Standard month/Legends|months]] later, the grand [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] acted on his emotions, flying the ''Emperor's Disciple'' into the [[Fire/Legends|firestorm]] of the [[Denarii Nova]], killing all 37,000 people aboard, including himself.<ref name="Who" /> His death was later referenced in ''[[The Essential Chronology]]'', a [[Historian/Legends|historical]] document compiled by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Emperor's Disciple'' was first indirectly mentioned in the [[2000]] reference book [[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|''The Essential Chronology'']], written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and [[Daniel Wallace]], as the flagship of Grand Admiral Il-Raz.<ref name="EC" /> The [[2003]] article "[[Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals]]," also written by Wallace along with [[Abel G. Peña]], and published in [[Star Wars Insider 66|''Star Wars Insider'' 66]], was the first source to name the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="Who" /> Wallace and Peña originally wrote an article about the grand admirals for ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'', which identified the ''Emperor's Disciple'' as an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]], but the article was unpublished due to ''Star Wars Gamer''{{'s}} cancellation.<ref name="Blog">{{Blog|danwallace|16|Grand Admirals: What Have They Got in their Pocketsses?}}</ref>
